message:
test(extension_dispatcher): add protocol error-code taxonomy and validation tests

Add 40+ focused unit tests for protocol helper functions in
extension_dispatcher.rs covering:
- protocol_error_code() taxonomy mapping for all known codes plus
  edge cases (empty, whitespace, case insensitivity)
- parse_protocol_hostcall_method() for all 7 methods with case/trim
- protocol_normalize_output() wrapping behavior for all JSON types
- protocol_error_fallback_reason() mapping with known/unknown methods
- protocol_error_details() structure completeness and sorted keys
- protocol_hostcall_op() extraction priority (op > method > name)
- hostcall_outcome_to_protocol_result() for success/error/stream
- hostcall_outcome_to_protocol_result_with_trace() detail inclusion

Bead: bd-3ar8v.4.8.21

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
